# Mundiagua

> Authorized technical service for water treatment and electrohydraulics in Mallorca, with more than 25 years of experience.

Mundiagua provides authorized technical service for IDEGIS, FLUIDRA, ZODIAC (FLUIDRA), BWT and ATH (BWT) in Mallorca, including maintenance, repairs, and water treatment installations.

## Services

- Authorized technical service for IDEGIS
- Authorized technical service for FLUIDRA
- Authorized technical service for ZODIAC (FLUIDRA)
- Authorized technical service for BWT
- Authorized technical service for ATH (BWT)
- Water treatment installations
- Electrohydraulic systems maintenance and repair
- Breakdowns, inspections, and installations

## Contact

- Phone: 971 795 177
- WhatsApp: 663 931 426
- Email: consultas@mundiaguabalear.com
- Address: Carrer de General Weyler, 58, 07141 Marratxi (Mallorca, Illes Balears)
- Customer service hours: Monday to Thursday 8:30am to 4:00pm and Friday 8:30am to 3:00pm
